mapper.sql: select alarm_id, alarm_beginTime, sequence_id, row_index, groove_number, subdivide_number, observation_place, temperature_variation from alarm_electrolytic_cell

select a.alarm_id, c.sequence_id, c.row_index, c.groove_number, c.subdivide_number, c.observation_place, c.temperature_variation, c.repeat_number, c.repeat_time, c.repeat_handler_users, c.repeat_handle_time, h.handle_status, h.handle_time, h.handler_id, a.device_sn, a.alarm_type, a.alarm_rank, a.alarm_status, a.alarm_beginTime, a.alarm_endTime, a.picture_path, a.irms_sn, a.alarm_cid, a.target_name, h.apparatus_id, h.opinion, h.handler_name, h.confirm_user_id, handle_picture from alarm a inner join alarm_electrolytic_cell c on c.alarm_id = a.alarm_id inner join alarm_handle h on h.alarm_id = a.alarm_id
mapper.select: select a.alarm_id, c.sequence_id, c.row_index, c.groove_number, c.subdivide_number, c.observation_place, c.temperature_variation, c.repeat_number, c.repeat_time, c.repeat_handler_users, c.repeat_handle_time, h.handle_status, h.handle_time, h.handler_id, a.device_sn, a.alarm_type, a.alarm_rank, a.alarm_status, a.alarm_beginTime, a.alarm_endTime, a.picture_path, a.irms_sn, a.alarm_cid, a.target_name, h.apparatus_id, h.handler_name, h.confirm_user_id, h.handle_picture, h.opinion from alarm a left join alarm_electrolytic_cell c on c.alarm_id = a.alarm_id left join alarm_handle h on h.alarm_id = c.alarm_id where a.alarm_id = #{alarmId}
mapper.insert:
insert into alarm_electrolytic_cell
alarm_id, alarm_beginTime, sequence_id, row_index, groove_number, subdivide_number, observation_place, temperature_variation, repeat_number, repeat_time, repeat_handler_users, repeat_handle_time,
#{alarmId}, #{alarmBegintime}, #{sequenceId}, #{rowIndex}, #{grooveNumber}, #{subdivideNumber}, #{observationPlace}, #{temperatureVariation}, #{repeatNumber}, #{repeatTime}, #{repeatHandlerUsers}, #{repeatHandleTime},

insert into alarm_electrolytic_cell_ectype
alarm_id, sequence_id, row_index, groove_number, subdivide_number, observation_place, temperature_variation, device_sn, irms_sn,
#{alarmId}, #{sequenceId}, #{rowIndex}, #{grooveNumber}, #{subdivideNumber}, #{observationPlace}, #{temperatureVariation}, #{deviceSn}, #{irmsSn},

insert into alarm_electrolytic_cell
alarm_id, alarm_beginTime, sequence_id, row_index, groove_number, subdivide_number, observation_place, temperature_variation,
values
#{item.alarmId}, #{item.alarmBegintime}, #{item.sequenceId}, #{item.rowIndex}, #{item.grooveNumber}, #{item.subdivideNumber}, #{item.observationPlace}, #{item.temperatureVariation},
mapper.delete:
update alarm_electrolytic_cell set del_flag=2 where alarm_id in
#{alarmId}
mapper.select: select a.alarm_id, c.sequence_id, c.row_index, c.groove_number, c.subdivide_number, c.observation_place, c.temperature_variation, a.device_sn, a.alarm_type, a.alarm_rank, a.alarm_beginTime, a.alarm_endTime from alarm_electrolytic_cell_ectype c inner join alarm a on c.alarm_id = a.alarm_id where c.sequence_id is not null order by a.alarm_beginTime desc, c.alarm_id desc
